title: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua to step aside as company pushes into robotaxis, robotics
summary: In January, the company acquired Shashua’s humanoid robotics startup Mentee Robotics for $900 million , which Shashua called part of “Mobileye 3.0,” the next phase of the business focused on robotics and automotive AI.
